vocab.meaning: khao khát mãnh liệt làm điều gì đó
vocab.example: I chose Environmental Science because I’ve always had a burning desire to contribute to the fight against climate change.

vocab.meaning: bị thu hút về phía/có xu hướng chọn
vocab.example: In high school, I naturally began to gravitate towards social sciences as I found human behavior fascinating.
While I enjoy the arts, the excellent career prospects in Information Technology were a major factor in my decision.

vocab.meaning: ăn sâu vào/trở thành một phần bản sắc của
vocab.example: A fascination with ancient cultures has been deeply ingrained in me since my first visit to a museum as a child.
I opted for Engineering because I prefer subjects that have a direct practical application in the real world.

vocab.meaning: khiếu bẩm sinh/tài năng thiên bẩm
vocab.example: My teachers suggested I study Graphic Design since I’ve always had a natural flair for visual arts.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng nền tảng kiến thức
vocab.example: I decided to major in Business Administration to broaden my knowledge base and understand how global markets function.

vocab.meaning: được săn đón/có nhu cầu cao
vocab.example: Data analysis is a highly sought-after skill, which is why I chose to specialize in Statistics.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/tính chuyên sâu trong học thuật
vocab.example: I was attracted to the academic rigor of the Law program, even though I knew it would be incredibly demanding.

vocab.meaning: theo bước chân của ai đó (làm cùng nghề/ngành)
vocab.example: Both of my parents are surgeons, so it felt right to follow in their footsteps and pursue a degree in Medicine.
